summary: Translator not inventor. Consumes PRE_ARC_INPUT_PACKET; emits factory-compatible BLUEPRINT.json + receipts.
must_not: ask founder mechanical questions after handoff
require founder_usability_pass before machine path completes
must_do: emit exact_inputs on every write_file_exact step
run mechanical builder simulation before write
return BLOCKED_RETURN_TO_IDC when intent gaps remain
honest handoff gate — never claim intent complete when coverage gaps exist

compile_modes.mechanical: Registered mission compiler snapshots CONTENT/ + exact contracts
compile_modes.product_host: Legacy PRODUCT blueprint re-emitted as write_file_exact

pass_fail.HANDOFF_PASS: Point B — FP + intent artifacts complete. Adam job done until Alpha.
pass_fail.MACHINE_PATH_PASS: B→C — ARC blueprint + Builder TECHNICAL_PASS + acceptance. Ready for Adam Alpha evaluation.
pass_fail.ALPHA_PASS: Point C — founder_usability_pass true after Adam evaluates outcome.
pass_fail.MECHANICAL_PASS: ARC simulation clear + cold walk handoff_to_builder
pass_fail.FAIL: handoff gaps, simulation gaps, builder failure, or proof_lap claiming product path
